content.mainTitle: YouTube to FLAC Converter – Lossless Audio
content.intro1: YTMP3 provides a free YouTube to FLAC converter that extracts lossless compressed audio from YouTube videos.
content.intro2: FLAC offers the best of both worlds: lossless audio quality with smaller file sizes than WAV, making it perfect for audiophiles and music collectors.
content.whatIsText: FLAC (Free Lossless Audio Codec) is a compressed audio format that preserves 100% of the original audio quality. Unlike MP3, FLAC doesn't discard any audio data, while still achieving 50-60% compression compared to WAV.

reasons.title: Lossless Quality
reasons.text: Preserves original audio without any quality loss.

reasons.title: Smaller Than WAV
reasons.text: 50-60% smaller file size while maintaining lossless quality.

reasons.title: Audiophile Standard
reasons.text: Preferred format for high-fidelity music collections.

reasons.title: Wide Support
reasons.text: Supported by most modern audio players and devices.

instructions.title: How to Convert YouTube to FLAC
steps: Select FLAC as the output format.
Click Convert and download your FLAC file.

items.question: Is FLAC better than MP3?
items.answer: Yes, for quality. FLAC preserves 100% of the original audio while MP3 discards data. However, FLAC files are larger than MP3 320kbps.

items.question: Can I play FLAC files on my phone?
items.answer: Yes. FLAC is natively supported on Windows 10, macOS, iOS, Android, and most modern audio players. For wider compatibility, consider M4A.

items.question: How much smaller is FLAC than WAV?
items.answer: FLAC typically reduces file size by 40-50% compared to uncompressed WAV while maintaining identical audio quality.

items.question: Is the FLAC converter free?
items.answer: Yes, completely free with no limits on conversions.
